DepthDeltaContract.description:
What depth is deferred OFF the glance-slide INTO the workbook.

The dual-coding anchor: the deck's tight voiceover stays tight precisely
because the workbook carries the deferred depth named here. Frozen
value-object — its identity is its content.

deferred_from_slide.description: Open-id of the glance-slide / plan-unit whose depth is deferred into the workbook (the dual-coding anchor).
deferred_from_slide.title: Deferred From Slide

deferred_depth.description: Free-text, verbatim: what depth moves off the glance-slide into the workbook. The legitimization of the tight slide voiceover.
deferred_depth.title: Deferred Depth

retained_on_slide.description: Free-text, verbatim: what stays at glance altitude on the slide (helps the producer avoid re-stating it). Optional.
retained_on_slide.title: Retained On Slide

DepthDeltaContract.title: DepthDeltaContract

Exercise.description:
A workbook exercise carrying a Bloom level + a source-grounded
answer-key reference slot.

Honesty-gate G3: ``answer_key_source_ref`` is a structurally-valid
reference slot authored backward from sourced content — not a fabricated
citation, and not the worked solution (the producer composes prose under
G1; S3 resolves the reference to a real source).

exercise_id.description: Open-id stable identifier for this exercise.
exercise_id.title: Exercise Id

bloom_level.description: Revised-Bloom cognitive level (closed set). Red values rejected at construction, in the JSON Schema enum, and via TypeAdapter.
bloom_level.title: Bloom Level

prompt_intent.description: Free-text, verbatim: the exercise's pedagogical intent. The worked prompt prose is composed by the producer, not here.
prompt_intent.title: Prompt Intent

answer_key_source_ref.description: Source-grounded answer-key reference slot (source_ref shape). A structurally-valid reference the research wiring resolves to a real source; never a fabricated citation.
answer_key_source_ref.title: Answer Key Source Ref

origin.description: Exercise authority (D2 MERGE, 39.1b): provenance is a FIELD, not a list position. ``collateral`` = Irene-authored practice; ``enrichment`` = a course-check instrument projected off the G0 enrichment overlay. Back-compat default keeps every previously serialized spec loading unchanged.
origin.title: Origin

Exercise.title: Exercise

ResearchEnrichmentGoal.description:
A research-enrichment goal expressed as pedagogical intent.

The boundary keeper: a conservative, false-positive-averse validator
rejects obvious raw fetch-query shapes (URLs, boolean-operator soup) so S1
emits *intent* and the research wiring (S3) owns intent -> fetch.

goal_id.description: Open-id stable identifier for this research-enrichment goal.
goal_id.title: Goal Id

pedagogical_intent.description: Free-text, verbatim: the pedagogical reason the learner needs enrichment (e.g. 'learner needs the primary-source basis for the 23% figure'). Must be intent, not a raw fetch query.
pedagogical_intent.title: Pedagogical Intent

binds_to_objective_id.description: Optional open-id linkage to a workbook section's learning objective; null when the goal is not section-scoped.
binds_to_objective_id.title: Binds To Objective Id

ResearchEnrichmentGoal.title: ResearchEnrichmentGoal

WorkbookSection.description:
One workbook section, bound to a learning objective.

The asset-lesson pairing invariant extended to collateral: every section
binds a ``learning_objective_id`` and carries a required ``depth_delta``.

section_id.description: Open-id stable identifier for this workbook section.
section_id.title: Section Id

learning_objective_id.description: Open-id of the learning objective this section serves (the asset-lesson pairing invariant; required, never empty). Reuses the single-source open-id regex so the producer can bind asset -> objective without a regex fork.
learning_objective_id.title: Learning Objective Id

depth_delta.description: Required: the depth-delta contract naming what depth is deferred off the glance-slide into this section (the load-bearing field).

exercises.description: Exercises for this section (may be empty for a pure-narrative section). Each carries a Bloom level + answer-key reference.
exercises.title: Exercises

narrative_intent.description: Free-text, verbatim: the fuller-narrative brief for this section. Prose is composed by the producer under G1, not here.
narrative_intent.title: Narrative Intent

WorkbookSection.title: WorkbookSection

WorkbookSpec.description: The workbook content model — a non-empty list of bound sections.

kind.description: Artifact-type discriminant (S7 canonical-arc). Closed set: the narrated-deck companion workbook is the sole member today. Additive + back-compatible (absent -> default). The 'collateral' umbrella will carry additional typed artifacts in a later projector family; typing the ARTIFACT (not the umbrella) keeps that seam clean.
kind.title: Kind

sections.description: Workbook sections; non-empty when collateral is present.
sections.title: Sections

WorkbookSpec.title: WorkbookSpec

description:
The DP4 collateral content model carried on ``lesson_plan["collateral"]``.

``declaration`` is the explicit empty-case discriminant: ``"none"`` is the
on-record decision that this lesson ships deck-only (degenerate-empty),
NOT an absent key; ``"present"`` requires a workbook with >=1 section.

schema_version.description: Pinned to SCHEMA_VERSION; changes drive CHANGELOG entries.
schema_version.title: Schema Version

declaration.description: Explicit empty-case discriminant. 'none' = on-record decision to ship deck-only; 'present' requires a workbook with >=1 section.
declaration.title: Declaration

workbook.description: The workbook content model; present iff declaration == 'present'.

research_goals.description: Research-enrichment goals (pedagogical intent). May be empty even when declaration == 'present'; research is enrichment, not mandatory for a workbook section.
research_goals.title: Research Goals

title: CollateralSpec
